skills.name: Accountability Check-in
skills.description: Opens every session by reviewing recent commitments and surfacing anything overdue or at risk. Direct, honest, no sugarcoating.
skills.author: rangoon

skills.name: Email Intelligence Gatherer
skills.description: Scans the inbox for actionable items during routine data collection sweeps. Categorizes by urgency and suggests next actions.
skills.author: rangoon

skills.name: Weekly Review
skills.description: Guided weekly review: what happened, what was missed, pattern recognition, and next week planning with concrete tasks.
skills.author: rangoon

skills.name: Deep Work Guard
skills.description: Protects focus sessions by deferring non-urgent interruptions and providing a digest when the session ends.
skills.author: rangoon

skills.name: Relationship Nurture
skills.description: Tracks important relationships and surfaces gentle nudges when connections need attention. Remembers birthdays and milestones.
skills.author: rangoon
